info.title: suno-api
info.description: Use API to call the music generation service of Suno.ai and easily integrate it into agents like GPTs.

tags.name: Utility
tags.description: Query, quota, clip and persona endpoints

post.description:
This is the key endpoint for music generation in simple (non-custom) mode. Each request returns exactly **2 songs**, consuming 10 credits total.

- **Stream URL**: typically available in 30–40 seconds (`status`: `streaming`)
- **Downloadable song URL**: usually ready in 2–3 minutes (`status`: `complete`)

### Parameter usage (Simple Mode)

This endpoint maps to Suno's non-custom mode — only `prompt` is required:

- **`prompt`**: always required. Serves as the core idea; Suno auto-generates lyrics based on it (lyrics may not strictly match the input). **Maximum 500 characters.**
- **`make_instrumental`**: optional. Set `true` for instrumental-only; set `false` (default) to auto-generate vocals/lyrics.
- **`model`**: optional. Suno model version (`mv` parameter). Defaults to `chirp-auk-turbo` if omitted.
- **`wait_audio`**: optional. Controls sync vs async response behavior (see below).

For custom lyrics, genre tags, and title control, use `/api/custom_generate` instead.

### wait_audio modes

- `false` (default): **async** — returns task info immediately; poll `/api/get` with returned `id` values for status and URLs
- `true`: **sync** — waits up to 100s until audio is generated, then returns URLs directly (recommended for GPTs and agents)

### Developer notes

1. **First-time users**: only provide `prompt`, set `make_instrumental` to `false` — simplest way to test the API
2. Respect the **500-character** prompt limit in simple mode to avoid errors
3. Use `/api/get` to actively poll task status instead of relying solely on `wait_audio`
4. Response `status` progresses: `submitted` → `queue` → `streaming` → `complete` (or `error`)
5. When `API_AUTH_ENABLED=true`, include `Authorization: Bearer <API_SECRET>` in request headers

Custom mode lets you set lyrics, genre (tags), title, and more.

Each request generates **2 audio tracks**, consuming 10 credits total.

### Field requirements
- When `make_instrumental` is `false`: `prompt`, `tags`, and `title` are required
- When `make_instrumental` is `true`: `tags` and `title` are required; `prompt` can be omitted

### wait_audio modes
- `false` (default): async — poll `/api/get` for results
- `true`: sync — wait up to 100s for audio URLs

Extend an existing audio clip. By default extends from the end of the track.

Use `continue_at` (seconds) to extend from a specific point in the song.
Generate lyrics from a text prompt without creating audio.

get.description: Retrieve word-level timestamps for synchronized lyric display during playback.

parameters.name: song_id
parameters.description: The audio/song ID to fetch aligned lyrics for.

post.description: Separate a song into stem tracks (e.g. vocals and instrumental).
Merge extended audio clips into a complete song using the clip ID.

get.description:
Fetch audio metadata by ID(s). Omit `ids` to list all music.

- Multiple IDs: comma-separated, e.g. `id1,id2`
- Use `page` for pagination when listing all tracks

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Audio IDs, comma-separated. Leave blank to return all music.

get.description: Returns remaining credits and monthly usage for the authenticated Suno account.
Retrieve clip details by clip ID.
Retrieve persona details and associated clips with pagination.

post.description:
OpenAI-compatible wrapper around `/api/generate`. Accepts a `messages` array and returns markdown with title, cover, lyrics, and audio URL.

Generally used in OpenAI-compatible clients and GPTs.

200.description: Markdown text with song title, cover image, lyrics, and audio URL

text/plain.example:
## Song Title: Peaceful Piano
![Song Cover](https://example.com/cover.jpeg)
### Lyrics:
[Verse] Soft melodies...
### Listen to the song: https://example.com/audio.mp3

BearerAuth.description: When `API_AUTH_ENABLED=true`, send `Authorization: Bearer <API_SECRET>`. Obtain `API_SECRET` from your `.env` file (e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`).

ModelName.description:
Suno model version passed as the `mv` parameter to Suno's generation API.

Available options:

- **`chirp-auk-turbo`**: V4.5-all — **Free Plan default** (Best free model)
- **`chirp-auk`**: V4.5 Pro — requires Pro/Premier subscription
- **`chirp-v4`**: V4 Pro
- **`chirp-bluejay`**: V4.5+ Pro
- **`chirp-crow`**: V5 Pro
- **`chirp-fenix`**: V5.5 Pro

Omit this field to use the server default (`chirp-auk-turbo`). Use the model matching your Suno plan tier.

prompt.description:
A description of the desired audio content.

In Simple Mode (this endpoint):

- **Always required**
- Serves as the core creative idea; Suno **auto-generates lyrics** from it (output may not strictly match the input)
- **Maximum 500 characters** — exceeding this may cause errors

Examples:

- "A calm and relaxing piano track with soft melodies"
- "An upbeat electronic dance track with heavy bass and energetic drops"
- "A popular heavy metal song about war, sung by a deep-voiced male singer"
prompt.example: A popular heavy metal song about war, sung by a deep-voiced male singer, slowly and melodiously. The lyrics depict the sorrow of people after the war.

make_instrumental.description:
Determines if the audio should be instrumental (no lyrics/vocals).

- **`false`** (default): Suno auto-generates lyrics and vocals from `prompt`
- **`true`**: generates instrumental-only track with no vocals

In Simple Mode, only `prompt` is required regardless of this setting.

wait_audio.description:
Controls whether the API waits for audio generation before responding.

- **`false`** (default): async/background mode — returns clip metadata immediately (`status` may be `submitted` or `queue`); call `/api/get?ids=<id>` to poll for `streaming`/`complete` and audio URLs
- **`true`**: sync mode — blocks up to **100 seconds** waiting for generation; returns `audio_url` directly when ready (best for GPTs and synchronous clients)

example.prompt: A popular heavy metal song about war, sung by a deep-voiced male singer, slowly and melodiously. The lyrics depict the sorrow of people after the war.

prompt.description:
Lyrics or detailed prompt.

- Required when `make_instrumental` is `false`
- Can be omitted for instrumental tracks
prompt.example:
[Verse 1]
Cruel flames of war engulf this land
Battlefields filled with death and dread
Innocent souls in darkness, they rest
My heart trembles in this silent test

[Verse 2]
People weep for loved ones lost
Battered bodies bear the cost
Seeking peace and hope once known
Our grief transforms to hearts of stone

[Chorus]
Silent battlegrounds, no birds' song
Shadows of war, where we don't belong
May flowers of peace bloom in this place
Let's guard this precious dream with grace

[Bridge]
Through the ashes, we will rise
Hand in hand, towards peaceful skies
No more sorrow, no more pain
Together, we'll break these chains

[Chorus]
Silent battlegrounds, no birds' song
Shadows of war, where we don't belong
May flowers of peace bloom in this place
Let's guard this precious dream with grace

[Outro]
In unity, our strength will grow
A brighter future, we'll soon know
From the ruins, hope will spring
A new dawn, we'll together bring

negative_tags.description: Styles or traits to exclude from generation.

make_instrumental.description:
Whether to generate instrumental-only audio.

- `true`: only `tags` and `title` required
- `false`: `prompt`, `tags`, and `title` required

wait_audio.description: Whether to wait for generation to complete (up to 100s).

example.title: Silent Battlefield

audio_id.description: ID of the audio clip to extend.

prompt.description: Lyrics or continuation prompt for the extended section.
prompt.example:
[lrc]Silent battlegrounds, no birds' song
Shadows of war, where we don't belong
May flowers of peace bloom in this place
Let's guard this precious dream with grace
[endlrc]

continue_at.description: Extend from this point in seconds (e.g. 109.96). Defaults to end of track.

wait_audio.description: Whether to wait for generation to complete.

example.prompt:
[lrc]Silent battlegrounds, no birds' song
Shadows of war, where we don't belong
May flowers of peace bloom in this place
Let's guard this precious dream with grace
[endlrc]
example.title: Silent Battlefield (Extended)

audio_id.description: ID of the song to generate stems for.

prompt.description: Theme or idea for the lyrics.

clip_id.description: Clip ID of the extended track to concatenate into a full song.

messages.description: OpenAI-style message array. At least one message with `role: user` is required.

content.example: A popular heavy metal song about war, sung by a deep-voiced male singer, slowly and melodiously. The lyrics depict the sorrow of people after the war.

messages.content: A popular heavy metal song about war, sung by a deep-voiced male singer, slowly and melodiously. The lyrics depict the sorrow of people after the war.

audio_info.description: Audio track metadata returned by generation and query endpoints.

lyric.example: [Verse] Soft melodies drift through the air

status.description:
Generation lifecycle status:

- **`submitted`**: task accepted, waiting to start
- **`queue`**: queued for generation
- **`streaming`**: partial/streaming audio available (~30–40s after request)
- **`complete`**: full downloadable audio ready (~2–3 min after request)
- **`error`**: generation failed — check `error_message` if present

duration.description: Audio duration in seconds, populated when generation completes.

gpt_description_prompt.description: Original user prompt in simple mode.

prompt.description: Final generation prompt (auto-generated in simple mode, user-provided in custom mode).

tags.example: Dancehall with uptempo dembow bounce, skittering hi-hats, punchy kick-snare, and rubbery sub-bass; verse stays clipped and percussive, pre-chorus strips to drums and bass with rising chants, chorus lands with big crowd hooks and bright synth stabs. Lead vocal is gritty and close-mic with doubled hook lines, ad-lib throws, and gang vocals on the chant. Ear candy: reverse cymbal lifts, bass drops before the chorus, and little horn pops between phrases. Mix is loud, glossy, and hard-hitting.

credits_left.description: Remaining credits. Each generated audio consumes 5 credits.

AudioInfo200.description:
Success — single audio object (complete state).

Source: `tests/get-response.json` (first item).

example.title: Bend So Low
example.lyric:
[Verse 1]
Step in the room, make space
Heel to toe, nice pace
Wine slow, then spin fast
Everybody want that last
Bend low, let it show
Catch the groove and let it go
[Pre-Chorus]
Hold tight, now release
Body move, find the heat
One more step, don't stop
Feel that pressure rise up
[Chorus]
Bend so low, bend so low
Bend so low, let it go
Bend so low, bend so low
Move that waist, steal the show
(steal the show)
Bend so low, bend so low
When you drop, everybody know
[Verse 2]
Fresh fit, clean cut
Bassline shake, back up
Hands up, then dip down
Make the whole place turn around
Side to side, never bored
Watch your name get called for sure
[Pre-Chorus]
Hold tight, now release
Body move, find the heat
One more step, don't stop
Feel that pressure rise up
[Chorus]
Bend so low, bend so low
Bend so low, let it go
Bend so low, bend so low
Move that waist, steal the show
(steal the show)
Bend so low, bend so low
When you drop, everybody know
[Bridge]
Touch the floor, come back clean
Make it slick, make it mean
One breath, then you break
Whole place jumping when you shake
[Chorus]
Bend so low, bend so low
Bend so low, let it go
Bend so low, bend so low
Move that waist, steal the show
(steal the show)
Bend so low, bend so low
When you drop, everybody know

example.tags: Dancehall with uptempo dembow bounce, skittering hi-hats, punchy kick-snare, and rubbery sub-bass; verse stays clipped and percussive, pre-chorus strips to drums and bass with rising chants, chorus lands with big crowd hooks and bright synth stabs. Lead vocal is gritty and close-mic with doubled hook lines, ad-lib throws, and gang vocals on the chant. Ear candy: reverse cymbal lifts, bass drops before the chorus, and little horn pops between phrases. Mix is loud, glossy, and hard-hitting.

AudioInfoArray200.description:
Success — array of exactly 2 audio objects per generation request (async initial response).

Source: `tests/generate-response.json`. When `wait_audio` is `false`, `audio_url` is usually empty and `status` is `submitted`; poll `/api/get?ids=` until `streaming` or `complete`.

StemInfoArray200.description: Success — array of stem track objects

example.text:
[Verse]
Stars above, shining bright
Whisper dreams into the night
example.title: Starlight Lullaby

BadRequest.description: Bad request — missing or invalid parameters

NetworkError.description: Network error — unable to reach Suno API

example.error: Network error: Unable to connect to Suno API. Please check your internet connection and try again.

AudioInfoGetArray200.description:
Success — audio metadata after polling (complete response).

Source: `tests/get-response.json`.

example.tags: Dancehall with uptempo dembow bounce, skittering hi-hats, punchy kick-snare, and rubbery sub-bass; verse stays clipped and percussive, pre-chorus strips to drums and bass with rising chants, chorus lands with big crowd hooks and bright synth stabs. Lead vocal is gritty and close-mic with doubled hook lines, ad-lib throws, and gang vocals on the chant. Ear candy: reverse cymbal lifts, bass drops before the chorus, and little horn pops between phrases. Mix is loud, glossy, and hard-hitting.
